---
title: "Mengyao Ma"
image: "profile.jpg"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:mem032@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mengyao-ma-a25409382/
---

Business Analytics student at UC San Diego interested in building SQL and Tableau dashboard, conducting A/B tests, and developing data-driven recommendations.

### Experience
- Automate365
- LVMH Perfumes&Cosmetics
- HP Tech Venture

### Technical Skills
- SQL, Python, R
- Tableau, Excel, Snowflake
- A/B Testing, Dashboarding, ETL

### Focus Areas
- Data Analytics & Visualization
- Marketing and Funnel Analysis
- Business Intelligence
- ETL and Data Integration
